entities.name: OpenAI
entities.blurb: Maker of ChatGPT and the GPT models. Restructured into OpenAI Group PBC in October 2025, controlled by the non-profit OpenAI Foundation.

entities.name: Google DeepMind
entities.blurb: Google's unified AI research lab (DeepMind + Google Brain), maker of the Gemini models. A wholly-owned part of Alphabet.

entities.name: Anthropic
entities.blurb: Maker of the Claude models and a public-benefit corporation. Backed by Amazon, Google, Microsoft and Nvidia while remaining independently controlled by its founders and a long-term-benefit trust. Reportedly in talks in mid-2026 to raise at up to a $900B valuation.

entities.name: Meta Superintelligence Labs
entities.blurb: Meta's AI division, founded June 2025 under chief AI officer Alexandr Wang. Absorbed FAIR and the Llama/Muse model efforts.

entities.name: xAI
entities.blurb: Maker of Grok. Merged with X (formerly Twitter) in March 2025, then absorbed by SpaceX in early 2026 into a combined ~$1.25T entity controlled by Elon Musk.

entities.name: DeepSeek
entities.blurb: Chinese lab whose efficient open-weight models shook the market in 2025. Wholly backed by hedge fund High-Flyer until its first external round (~$7.4B) closed in June 2026.

entities.name: Safe Superintelligence (SSI)
entities.blurb: Founded by ex-OpenAI chief scientist Ilya Sutskever to build safe superintelligence directly, with no interim products and no revenue.

entities.name: Scale AI
entities.blurb: Data-labeling and evaluation infrastructure for AI training. Meta took a 49% non-voting stake in 2025.

entities.name: Anysphere (Cursor)
entities.blurb: Maker of Cursor, the leading AI coding tool. SpaceX agreed in June 2026 to acquire it for ~$60B all-stock — the largest venture-backed startup acquisition on record — pending regulatory approval, expected to close Q3 2026.

entities.name: Perplexity AI
entities.blurb: AI-native answer engine competing with traditional search.

entities.name: Mistral AI
entities.blurb: France's leading AI lab, known for open-weight models — Europe's flagship independent frontier effort. Last valued at ~€11.7B ($14B) in its Sept 2025 ASML-led round; reportedly in talks in mid-2026 to raise ~€3B at a ~€20B ($23B) valuation.

entities.name: Thinking Machines Lab
entities.blurb: Founded by former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati. Raised the largest seed round in history; talks at a ~$50B valuation collapsed in early 2026.

entities.name: ElevenLabs
entities.blurb: Leading AI voice and speech-synthesis company, eyeing an IPO.

entities.name: Cohere
entities.blurb: Enterprise- and sovereign-AI focused foundation-model company.

entities.name: Hugging Face
entities.blurb: The open-source hub where the industry shares models and datasets.

entities.name: Midjourney
entities.blurb: AI image generator — famously bootstrapped, with ~$600M ARR, roughly 40 staff and zero outside investors.

entities.name: Inflection AI
entities.blurb: Maker of the Pi assistant. Microsoft hired most of its team in a 2024 acqui-hire; Inflection continues as an enterprise company.

entities.name: Character.AI
entities.blurb: Consumer chatbot and companion platform. Google licensed its technology and re-hired co-founder Noam Shazeer in 2024.

entities.name: Stability AI
entities.blurb: Maker of the Stable Diffusion image models; recapitalized under new leadership in 2024.

entities.name: Nvidia
entities.blurb: The dominant AI-chip maker and the most prolific strategic investor across the entire AI stack.

entities.name: Alphabet / Google
entities.blurb: Owns Google DeepMind outright, is a major Anthropic backer, and licensed Character.AI's technology.

entities.name: Amazon
entities.blurb: Anthropic's largest investor and primary cloud/compute partner; entered OpenAI's 2026 round.

entities.name: Microsoft
entities.blurb: OpenAI's largest external shareholder; also runs its own MAI models and absorbed Inflection's team.

entities.name: Meta
entities.blurb: Runs Meta Superintelligence Labs and holds a 49% non-voting stake in Scale AI.

entities.name: Tencent
entities.blurb: Chinese tech giant; co-led DeepSeek's first external funding round in 2026.

entities.name: SpaceX
entities.blurb: Elon Musk's rocket company, which absorbed xAI in early 2026, went public on Nasdaq (SPCX) in June 2026, and days later agreed to acquire Cursor-maker Anysphere for ~$60B.

entities.name: ASML
entities.blurb: The Dutch monopoly supplier of EUV lithography machines; Mistral's largest shareholder.

entities.name: CATL
entities.blurb: The world's largest battery maker; co-led DeepSeek's 2026 round.

entities.name: Salesforce
entities.blurb: Enterprise-software giant investing across AI via Salesforce Ventures.

entities.name: SoftBank
entities.blurb: Japanese investment holding company; a lead backer of OpenAI's mega-rounds.

entities.name: Sequoia Capital
entities.blurb: Storied venture firm; led ElevenLabs' 2026 Series D.

entities.name: Andreessen Horowitz
entities.blurb: Venture firm with one of the broadest AI portfolios, from SSI to ElevenLabs.

entities.name: Lightspeed
entities.blurb: Venture firm backing SSI, Mistral and Stability AI.

entities.name: Coatue
entities.blurb: Crossover investor active in late-stage AI rounds.

entities.name: Greenoaks Capital
entities.blurb: Growth investor; lead backer of Safe Superintelligence.

entities.name: High-Flyer
entities.blurb: Chinese quant hedge fund founded by Liang Wenfeng that created and controls DeepSeek.

entities.name: Thrive Capital
entities.blurb: Josh Kushner's venture firm; a consistent OpenAI backer since 2023.

entities.name: OpenAI Foundation
entities.blurb: The non-profit that controls OpenAI Group PBC, appoints its board and holds ~26% of the equity.

relationships.detail: The non-profit OpenAI Foundation governs OpenAI Group PBC, appoints the entire board and holds ~26% of the equity after the October 2025 restructuring.

sources.title: OpenAI completes restructure — CNBC
Who owns OpenAI — ownership structure explained

relationships.detail: Microsoft is OpenAI's largest external shareholder (~26.79% at the October 2025 recap, since diluted by the 2026 round), with model access through 2032. The exclusive partnership and revenue-share ended in April 2026.

sources.title: Microsoft to get 27% of OpenAI — Bloomberg
OpenAI and Microsoft end exclusive partnership — Forbes

relationships.detail: The original ~$100B Nvidia–OpenAI investment partnership announced in Sept 2025 stalled and was never signed. Nvidia instead committed ~$30B to OpenAI's Feb 2026 round, alongside a 10-gigawatt compute partnership.

sources.title: Nvidia investment in OpenAI round 'nothing like' $100B — Bloomberg
OpenAI–Nvidia stalled on mega deal — CNBC

relationships.detail: SoftBank committed ~$30B to OpenAI's Feb 2026 round and anchored the earlier 2025 financings; the round pushed OpenAI's valuation to roughly $850B.

sources.title: Nvidia and OpenAI's $100B deal is dead — analysis

relationships.detail: Amazon led OpenAI's ~$110B February 2026 round with roughly $50B — its first stake in OpenAI, and a notable move given Amazon is also Anthropic's largest backer.

sources.title: Nvidia and OpenAI's $100B deal is dead — analysis

relationships.detail: Thrive Capital has backed OpenAI consistently since 2023, participating across multiple rounds and the employee secondary sale.

sources.title: OpenAI takes stake in Thrive Holdings — Private Equity Insights

relationships.detail: Google DeepMind is a wholly-owned division of Alphabet, formed by merging DeepMind and Google Brain in April 2023.

sources.title: Google DeepMind — official site

relationships.detail: Amazon is Anthropic's largest investor and primary cloud partner. Its position (convertible notes plus non-voting preferred) was reported worth ~$74B on paper by mid-2026.

sources.title: Amazon and Google's billions riding on Anthropic — Fortune

relationships.detail: In April 2026 Google committed up to $40B to Anthropic, with $10B wired immediately, on top of earlier multi-billion investments. The stake is minority and non-controlling.

sources.title: Amazon and Google's billions riding on Anthropic — Fortune

relationships.detail: In November 2025 Microsoft agreed to invest up to $5B in Anthropic (paired with an Azure compute commitment from Anthropic), joining its $30B round that closed at a ~$380B valuation in Feb 2026 — even as Microsoft remains OpenAI's largest shareholder.

sources.title: Anthropic valued ~$350B after Microsoft, Nvidia deal — CNBC
Anthropic closes $30B round at $380B valuation — CNBC

relationships.detail: Nvidia committed up to $10B to Anthropic in the November 2025 deal and joined the $30B round closing at ~$380B — backing Anthropic while also investing in OpenAI, SSI, Mistral and others.

sources.title: Anthropic valued ~$350B after Microsoft, Nvidia deal — CNBC

relationships.detail: Coatue and Singapore's sovereign wealth fund GIC co-led Anthropic's $30B round that closed at a ~$380B post-money valuation in February 2026.

sources.title: Anthropic closes $30B round at $380B valuation — CNBC

relationships.detail: Meta Superintelligence Labs is a wholly-owned Meta division, founded 30 June 2025 under chief AI officer Alexandr Wang and restructured again in March 2026.

sources.title: Meta Superintelligence Labs — overview
Meta debuts first major AI model since Wang deal — CNBC

relationships.detail: Meta paid ~$14.3B for a 49% non-voting stake in Scale AI (valuing it ~$29B) and brought founder Alexandr Wang into Meta. Scale continues to operate independently.

sources.title: Scale AI founder Wang exits for Meta — CNBC

relationships.detail: SpaceX absorbed xAI in February 2026 in the largest merger on record — a combined ~$1.25T entity controlled by Elon Musk. xAI had merged with X in March 2025.

sources.title: Musk's xAI, SpaceX combo biggest merger ever — CNBC
SpaceX combines with xAI at $1.25T — Bloomberg

relationships.detail: SpaceX agreed to acquire Anysphere (maker of Cursor) for ~$60B all-stock, disclosed in a June 2026 SEC filing days after its IPO — the largest venture-backed startup acquisition on record. Expected to close in Q3 2026 pending regulatory approval; Cursor becomes a coding engine for xAI's Grok.

sources.title: SpaceX to acquire Cursor for $60B — CNBC
SpaceX to acquire Cursor for $60B in stock — TechCrunch

relationships.detail: DeepSeek was created and wholly funded by hedge fund High-Flyer. In the June 2026 round, founder Liang Wenfeng himself contributed ¥20B and retains founder control; the round valued DeepSeek at ~$52B (¥350B+).

sources.title: DeepSeek reaches $52B valuation, backed by Tencent, CATL — Caixin
DeepSeek nears US$7b in first funding round — SCMP

relationships.detail: Tencent was the largest outside backer of DeepSeek's first external round (~$7.4B total) in June 2026, contributing ~¥10B at a ~$52B valuation.

sources.title: DeepSeek reaches $52B valuation, backed by Tencent, CATL — Caixin

relationships.detail: Battery maker CATL contributed ~¥5B to DeepSeek's June 2026 round, alongside Tencent, NetEase and JD.com.

sources.title: DeepSeek reaches $52B valuation, backed by Tencent, CATL — Caixin

relationships.detail: Greenoaks led SSI's ~$2B round in April 2025 at a $32B valuation, contributing $500M.

sources.title: SSI raises $2B at $32B valuation — TechCrunch

relationships.detail: Alphabet invested in SSI's 2025 round, paired with Google Cloud becoming SSI's primary TPU compute supplier.

sources.title: Ilya Sutskever's SSI financial breakdown — StartupHub

relationships.detail: Nvidia joined SSI's 2025 round, keeping the dominant chip vendor close to a marquee lab.

sources.title: Ilya Sutskever's SSI financial breakdown — StartupHub

relationships.detail: Andreessen Horowitz backed SSI's $1B seed and returned for the 2025 round.

sources.title: SSI raises $2B at $32B valuation — TechCrunch

relationships.detail: Lightspeed returned for SSI's 2025 round alongside DST Global.

sources.title: Ilya Sutskever's SSI financial breakdown — StartupHub

relationships.detail: Andreessen Horowitz led Thinking Machines Lab's $2B seed — the largest in history — at a $12B valuation in July 2025.

sources.title: Thinking Machines Lab worth $12B in seed round — TechCrunch

relationships.detail: Nvidia joined the $2B seed alongside Accel, ServiceNow, Cisco, AMD and Jane Street, and has since made multi-billion infrastructure commitments.

sources.title: Thinking Machines Lab worth $12B in seed round — TechCrunch

relationships.detail: ASML led Mistral's €1.7B Series C in September 2025 with ~€1.3B, becoming its largest shareholder at ~11% and taking a seat on the strategic committee.

sources.title: Mistral valued at $14B as ASML takes major stake — CNBC
ASML–Mistral strategic partnership — ASML

relationships.detail: Nvidia is a recurring Mistral investor, committing again in the 2025 Series C alongside a16z, DST, General Catalyst, Index, Lightspeed and Bpifrance.

sources.title: Mistral raises €1.7B — Mistral AI

relationships.detail: Nvidia is among Perplexity's strategic investors; the company was valued at ~$23B in its January 2026 round.

sources.title: Perplexity AI valuation 2026 — ValueAdd VC

relationships.detail: SoftBank's Vision Fund 2 is a Perplexity backer, alongside Jeff Bezos, IVP, Accel and NEA.

sources.title: Perplexity AI valuation 2026 — ValueAdd VC

relationships.detail: Sequoia led ElevenLabs' $500M Series D in February 2026 at an $11B valuation, taking a board seat.

sources.title: ElevenLabs raises $500M at $11B valuation — TechCrunch
ElevenLabs Series D — company blog

relationships.detail: Andreessen Horowitz quadrupled down in the 2026 Series D with super pro-rata participation, alongside ICONIQ.

sources.title: ElevenLabs Series D — company blog

relationships.detail: Nvidia joined the third close of ElevenLabs' Series D in May 2026, with BlackRock, Wellington, Salesforce and Santander.

sources.title: Nvidia-backed ElevenLabs hits $11B valuation — CNBC

relationships.detail: Nvidia has backed Cohere since its 2023 Series C and returned for the $500M round at a $6.8B valuation.

sources.title: Cohere hits $6.8B valuation as AMD, Nvidia, Salesforce double down — TechCrunch

relationships.detail: Salesforce Ventures has backed Cohere since 2023 and re-upped in the round that valued it at $6.8B.

sources.title: Cohere hits $6.8B valuation — TechCrunch

relationships.detail: Salesforce led Hugging Face's $235M Series D at a $4.5B valuation.

sources.title: Google, Amazon, Nvidia and others invest in Hugging Face — CNBC

relationships.detail: Nvidia joined Hugging Face's Series D alongside Google, Amazon, AMD, Intel, IBM and Qualcomm.

sources.title: Google, Amazon, Nvidia and others invest in Hugging Face — CNBC

relationships.detail: Google participated in the Series D that valued Hugging Face at $4.5B.

sources.title: Google, Amazon, Nvidia and others invest in Hugging Face — CNBC

relationships.detail: Microsoft paid ~$650M for a non-exclusive licence to Inflection's models and hired ~70 staff including Mustafa Suleyman and Karén Simonyan. It bought no equity — Inflection remains independent.

sources.title: Microsoft to pay Inflection AI $650M — Bloomberg

relationships.detail: Google paid ~$2.7B in August 2024 for a non-exclusive licence to Character.AI's technology and to re-hire co-founder Noam Shazeer. The structure drew DOJ antitrust scrutiny; Character.AI stayed independent.

sources.title: Google's $2.7B Character.AI deal draws DOJ attention — Calcalist

relationships.detail: Coatue co-led Stability AI's 2024 recapitalisation, which cleared the company's debt under new CEO Prem Akkaraju at a ~$1B valuation.

sources.title: Stability AI funding & investors — Sacra

relationships.detail: Lightspeed co-led the 2024 round alongside Coatue, Greycroft, Sound Ventures and angels including Eric Schmidt and Sean Parker.

sources.title: Stability AI funding & investors — Sacra
